nasb.text: It had a great and high wall, with twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels; and names were written on them, which are the names of the twelve tribes of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: It had a great, high wall, with twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels, and on the gates the names of the twelve tribes of the sons of Israel were inscribed—

cnv.text: 有高大的城牆，有十二個門，門口有十二位天使，門上寫著以色列十二支派的名字。

csbs.text: 她有又高又大的城墙，有十二个城门，城门前有十二位天使，又有名字刻在上头，是以色列子民十二支派的名字。
